title: Chart Container
description: Wrapper for charts/visualizations with title, description, legend, and accessible alternatives (summary/table).

props.name: empty
props.description: No data to display; show empty state copy.

states.name: empty
effects: Show empty message or empty-state component.

keyboard: Charts should not require mouse-only interaction to access key insights.
If chart has interactive controls (filters, toggles), they must be keyboard accessible.
aria: Provide a text summary and/or data table fallback for complex charts.
If the chart is an image/canvas, provide aria-label and long description nearby.
Legend items must not rely on color alone (include labels/patterns).

must: Chart must include a title and a summary or alternative access to data.
Do not rely on color alone to distinguish series.
should: Keep chart ink low: avoid heavy gridlines and decorative noise.
Support responsive sizing (container scales; avoids overflow).
must_not: Do not render charts without context (title/units/time range).

token_usage.notes: Use surface background for chart panels.
Optional border or divider between header and chart.

examples.title: Panel skeleton with summary
examples.html:
